{{nihongo|'''Sanjin gousai-den, Ideha Shrine'''|出羽神社(三神合祭殿)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Dewa Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sanjin gousai-den, Ideha Shrine'''|出羽神社(三神合祭殿)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Dewa Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sanjin gousai-den, Ideha Shrine'''|出羽神社(三神合祭殿)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Dewa Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sanjin gousai-den, Ideha Shrine'''|出羽神社(三神合祭殿)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Dewa Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sanjin gousai-den, Ideha Shrine'''|出羽神社(三神合祭殿)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Dewa Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sanjin gousai-den, Ideha Shrine'''|出羽神社(三神合祭殿)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Dewa Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sanjin gousai-den, Ideha Shrine'''|出羽神社(三神合祭殿)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Dewa Province]].
